public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quota scribe.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a quota scribe still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quota scribe in and around Miners’ Assembly, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Miners’ Assembly workable through the obligations of quota scribe while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Miners’ Assembly, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of quota scribe visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tovek Ashmason can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Tovek Ashmason needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Miners’ Assembly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Tovek Ashmason communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Miners’ Assembly: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
